song.title: Above All
song.author: Paul Baloche, Lenny LeBlanc
song.lyrics:
[V1] . A D E Above all powers, . A Above all kings, . D E A E/G# Above all nature |and all created things,|| . F#m E D A/C# Above all wisdom and all the ways of man, .Bm Bm/A E You were here |before the world began.|| . A D E Above all kingdoms, . A Above all thrones, . D E A E/G# Above all wonders |the world has ever known|| . F#m E D A/C# Above all wealth |and treasures of the earth, . Bm Bm/A C#7/G# There’s no way |to measure what You’re worth.
[C] . A D Crucified .E/G# A Laid behind the stone . D You lived to die .E/G# A Rejected and alone|| .E/G# F#m E D A/C# Like a rose trampled on the ground . Bm7 You took the fall . A/C# D E And thought of me . A Above all
